message:
Add 18 beads for diagram visualization improvements

New epic bd-ukp1f (Sub-Cell Canvas Diagram Rendering) with 6 subtasks,
plus 12 standalone beads covering: cell-mode shape rendering, interactive
navigation, minimap, edge bundling, color themes, DOT import, diagram
diffing, crossing minimization improvements, half-block fills,
constraint-based layout hints, and diagram search/filter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
